title: sig.len() cast to c_int via 'as' in EccKey::sign — inconsistent with hash_sz try_from
description: key.rs line 140: sig_sz initialized with 'sig.len() as c_int' while hash_sz on line 146 uses try_from. The 128-byte constant is trivially in range, but the inconsistency means a contributor who changes the buffer size may not think to add bounds checking — a future buf resize to >2GiB (unlikely) would silently truncate. Apply try_from consistently.
